title: Helping at home
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: My parents were very busy last weekend, so I decided to help more at home. On Saturday morning, I cleaned the kitchen and put everything back (27) its proper place. Then I went shopping with my dad because we needed food for the week. The supermarket was more crowded (28) usual, and it took us a long time to find everything. When we got home, I helped cook lunch, although I am not very good (29) preparing vegetables quickly. My mum was pleased (30) the meal because everyone enjoyed it. In the afternoon, I looked after my younger brother while my parents finished some work. We played a game together and then watched a film. I felt tired (31) the end of the day, but I was glad I had been useful. I think helping at home is important (32) everyone in a family.
